species: mixed co-culture (Bifidobacterium breve 46, B. longum 6:18, B. animalis

growth_records.medium: GITS dilution medium + GOS-FOS-XOS prebiotics (total 10 g/L carbohydrate)

up.units: mmol/gDW (cumulative consumption per biomass formed, not time-normalized)

growth_records.cite: Adamberg et al. Survival and synergistic growth of mixed cultures of bifidobacteria and lactobacilli combined with prebiotic oligosaccharides in a gastrointestinal tract simulator. Microbial Ecology in Health and Disease (2014). DOI:10.3402/mehd.v25.23062. [PMC4101457]
growth_records.snippet: Cons(hexose) 302.4 mmol/gdw; Lact 138.7; Ace 347.8; EtOH 91.7; For 117.6 mmol/gdw; Yxs 0.02 gdw/g(hexose) (Table 4, GOS-FOS-XOS)
growth_records.notes: Table 4 aggregate for GOS-FOS-XOS medium (experiments 1a-1c), whole mixed culture. Values are per g dry weight of biomass formed (mmol/gDW), NOT per-hour rates. Biomass dry weight estimated as cfu/mL x 0.25 pg per cell. Yxs=0.02 gDW/g hexose. Products acetate 347.8, lactate 138.7, formate 117.6, ethanol 91.7 mmol/gDW. ~47-48% of 10 g/L carbohydrate metabolized in 24 h. Not strain-resolved (co-culture); Bif fraction 52.7% at 24 h.
